requirement_topic.en: SSEC Grid Connection for BESS — 230/400 V 50 Hz System, IEC 62933, and Project-Specific Connection Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: SSEC BESS并网——230/400 V 50 Hz系统、IEC 62933及项目专属并网要求
requirement_topic.zht: SSEC BESS併網——230/400 V 50 Hz系統、IEC 62933及項目專屬併網要求

summary.en: The South Sudan Electricity Corporation (SSEC) is the state-owned entity responsible for electricity generation, transmission, and distribution in South Sudan. South Sudan's nominal grid standard is 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz — consistent with the IEC legacy inherited from the colonial and post-colonial infrastructure. Overall national electrification is extremely low (estimated below 10% as of 2024), and the formal interconnected grid is limited primarily to Juba and a small number of other urban centres. The vast majority of BESS deployments in South Sudan are off-grid or mini-grid, typically donor- or humanitarian-funded (UNDP, World Bank, USAID, bilateral aid programmes), and operate under project-specific technical specifications rather than a national grid code. No publicly accessible SSEC BESS grid-connection technical specification or grid code has been confirmed from official sources as of the dataset date. Where BESS is to be connected to the SSEC grid, project-specific connection terms must be agreed directly with SSEC. Donor and EPC project specifications routinely reference IEC 62933 (Electrical Energy Storage Systems) series standards including IEC 62933-2-1 (Unit Parameters and Testing Methods) and IEC 62933-5-2 (Safety Requirements for electrochemical-based systems).
summary.zh: 南苏丹电力公司（SSEC）是负责南苏丹发电、输电和配电的国有实体。南苏丹标称电网标准为单相230 V / 三相400 V 50 Hz——与殖民时期及后殖民基础设施所继承的IEC传统一致。全国总体电气化率极低（据估计2024年低于10%），正式互联电网主要局限于朱巴及少数其他城市中心。南苏丹绝大多数BESS部署为离网或微网形式，通常由捐助方或人道主义资金支持（UNDP、世界银行、USAID、双边援助项目），依据项目专属技术规格运行，而非依据国家电网规范。截至本数据集日期，尚未从官方来源确认SSEC公开发布专门针对BESS并网的技术规格或电网规范。若BESS须接入SSEC电网，项目专属并网条款须直接与SSEC协商确定。捐助方和EPC项目规格通常引用IEC 62933（电化学储能系统）系列标准，包括IEC 62933-2-1（单元参数和测试方法）和IEC 62933-5-2（电化学系统安全要求）。
summary.zht: 南蘇丹電力公司（SSEC）是負責南蘇丹發電、輸電和配電的國有實體。南蘇丹標稱電網標準為單相230 V / 三相400 V 50 Hz——與殖民時期及後殖民基礎設施所繼承的IEC傳統一致。全國總體電氣化率極低（據估計2024年低於10%），正式互聯電網主要局限於朱巴及少數其他城市中心。南蘇丹絕大多數BESS部署為離網或微網形式，通常由捐助方或人道主義資金支持（UNDP、世界銀行、USAID、雙邊援助項目），依據項目專屬技術規格運行，而非依據國家電網規範。截至本數據集日期，尚未從官方來源確認SSEC公開發布專門針對BESS併網的技術規格或電網規範。若BESS須接入SSEC電網，項目專屬併網條款須直接與SSEC協商確定。捐助方和EPC項目規格通常引用IEC 62933（電化學儲能系統）系列標準，包括IEC 62933-2-1（單元參數和測試方法）和IEC 62933-5-2（電化學系統安全要求）。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification (expected project-specification reference in donor-funded projects)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected project-specification reference)
South Sudan Electricity Act 2009 — primary legislation establishing SSEC and regulatory framework for electricity
SSEC — South Sudan Electricity Corporation (verify current grid-connection technical requirements directly; no publicly confirmed BESS grid code as of dataset date)

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120-2017 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). The PCS (energy storage converter) is assessed under NB/T 42090-2016 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters). Chinese BESS products are validated by grid operators through National Energy Administration (NEA)-authorised procedures. China's grid operates at 50 Hz, 220/380 V (220 V single-phase, 380 V three-phase). South Sudan's nominal standard is 230/400 V 50 Hz — both systems share 50 Hz frequency but the voltage levels differ: China 220/380 V versus South Sudan 230/400 V. PCS firmware, voltage protection thresholds, and ride-through settings configured for China's 220/380 V grid must be re-parameterised and validated for South Sudan's 230/400 V grid. Chinese GB/T grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals are not applicable to South Sudan and are not recognised by SSEC or donor project specifications.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120-2017（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。储能变流器（PCS）依据NB/T 42090-2016（储能变流器检测技术规程）进行评估。中国BESS产品通过国家能源局（NEA）授权程序获得电网运营商认可。中国电网运行参数为50 Hz、220/380 V（单相220 V、三相380 V）。南苏丹标称标准为230/400 V 50 Hz——两个系统共享50 Hz频率，但电压等级不同：中国220/380 V，南苏丹230/400 V。针对中国220/380 V电网配置的PCS固件、电压保护阈值和穿越参数，须重新针对南苏丹230/400 V电网条件进行参数配置和验证。中国GB/T并网证书和NEA审批在南苏丹不适用，不被SSEC或捐助方项目规格认可。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120-2017（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。儲能變流器（PCS）依據NB/T 42090-2016（儲能變流器檢測技術規程）進行評估。中國BESS產品通過國家能源局（NEA）授權程序獲得電網運營商認可。中國電網運行參數為50 Hz、220/380 V（單相220 V、三相380 V）。南蘇丹標稱標準為230/400 V 50 Hz——兩個系統共享50 Hz頻率，但電壓等級不同：中國220/380 V，南蘇丹230/400 V。針對中國220/380 V電網配置的PCS韌體、電壓保護閾值和穿越參數，須重新針對南蘇丹230/400 V電網條件進行參數配置和驗證。中國GB/T併網證書和NEA審批在南蘇丹不適用，不被SSEC或捐助方項目規格認可。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2017 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals are not applicable in South Sudan and will not be recognised by SSEC or donor project specifications. Key technical and procedural gaps: (a) voltage mismatch — South Sudan's nominal standard is 230/400 V and China's is 220/380 V; both systems operate at 50 Hz but PCS voltage protection thresholds, ride-through settings, and transformer tap configurations must be re-parameterised and re-validated for South Sudan conditions before commissioning; do not assume that shared 50 Hz frequency means electrical interoperability — voltage compatibility must be independently confirmed; (b) no publicly confirmed SSEC BESS grid-connection code — engage SSEC at the earliest project stage to determine applicable technical requirements; (c) donor and EPC specifications — almost all South Sudan BESS projects are donor-funded; confirm the applicable IEC 62933 version and project technical specification with the project owner or donor before equipment design is finalised; (d) extreme operating environment — South Sudan's ambient temperatures regularly exceed 40 °C and can reach 45 °C; all PCS and associated electrical equipment must be derated and rated for high-temperature operation; (e) communication protocols — confirm SCADA or remote monitoring protocol required by SSEC or the donor/project operator.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批在南苏丹不适用，不被SSEC或捐助方项目规格认可。主要技术和程序差距：（a）电压不匹配——南苏丹标称标准为230/400 V，中国为220/380 V；两个系统均在50 Hz频率下运行，但PCS电压保护阈值、穿越参数和变压器抽头配置须重新针对南苏丹条件进行参数配置和重新验证，方可调试；不得假设共享50 Hz频率意味着电气互操作性——电压兼容性须独立确认；（b）尚无公开确认的SSEC BESS并网规范——应在项目最早阶段与SSEC接触，确定适用技术要求；（c）捐助方和EPC规格——南苏丹几乎所有BESS项目均由捐助方资助；在设备设计最终确定前，与项目业主或捐助方确认适用的IEC 62933版本和项目技术规格；（d）极端运行环境——南苏丹环境温度经常超过40°C，可达45°C；所有储能变流器及相关电气设备须针对高温运行进行降额和额定值设计；（e）通信协议——确认SSEC或捐助方/项目运营商要求的SCADA或远程监控协议。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批在南蘇丹不適用，不被SSEC或捐助方項目規格認可。主要技術和程序差距：（a）電壓不匹配——南蘇丹標稱標準為230/400 V，中國為220/380 V；兩個系統均在50 Hz頻率下運行，但PCS電壓保護閾值、穿越參數和變壓器抽頭配置須重新針對南蘇丹條件進行參數配置和重新驗證，方可調試；不得假設共享50 Hz頻率意味著電氣互操作性——電壓相容性須獨立確認；（b）尚無公開確認的SSEC BESS併網規範——應在項目最早階段與SSEC接觸，確定適用技術要求；（c）捐助方和EPC規格——南蘇丹幾乎所有BESS項目均由捐助方資助；在設備設計最終確定前，與項目業主或捐助方確認適用的IEC 62933版本和項目技術規格；（d）極端運行環境——南蘇丹環境溫度經常超過40°C，可達45°C；所有儲能變流器及相關電氣設備須針對高溫運行進行降額和額定值設計；（e）通訊協議——確認SSEC或捐助方/項目運營商要求的SCADA或遠端監控協議。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for any SSEC grid-connected BESS — specific technical requirements must be obtained directly from SSEC; no publicly confirmed grid code for BESS as of dataset date. Off-grid and mini-grid BESS (the majority of deployments) are governed by project-owner or donor technical specifications.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558 and NEA grid-operator approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; not applicable or transferable to South Sudan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection compliance and NEA approvals are not recognised in South Sudan. South Sudan's nominal grid standard is 230/400 V 50 Hz — sharing 50 Hz with China but differing in voltage (China: 220/380 V); PCS must be re-parameterised and validated for 230/400 V before commissioning. No publicly confirmed SSEC BESS grid-connection code has been identified as of the dataset date. Most BESS deployments are off-grid or mini-grid under donor/EPC project specifications referencing IEC 62933. Engage SSEC or the project donor/owner at the earliest stage to determine applicable grid-connection or project technical requirements. All equipment must be rated for extreme heat (ambient up to 45 °C) with appropriate derating.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T BESS并网合规和NEA审批在南苏丹不被认可。南苏丹标称电网标准为230/400 V 50 Hz——与中国同为50 Hz，但电压不同（中国：220/380 V）；储能变流器须在调试前重新针对230/400 V进行参数配置和验证。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认SSEC公开发布BESS并网规范。大多数BESS部署为离网或微网形式，依据引用IEC 62933的捐助方/EPC项目规格运行。应在最早阶段与SSEC或项目捐助方/业主接触，确定适用的并网或项目技术要求。所有设备须针对极端高温（环境温度最高45°C）进行额定值设计并适当降额。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T BESS併網合規和NEA審批在南蘇丹不被認可。南蘇丹標稱電網標準為230/400 V 50 Hz——與中國同為50 Hz，但電壓不同（中國：220/380 V）；儲能變流器須在調試前重新針對230/400 V進行參數配置和驗證。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認SSEC公開發布BESS併網規範。大多數BESS部署為離網或微網形式，依據引用IEC 62933的捐助方/EPC項目規格運行。應在最早階段與SSEC或項目捐助方/業主接觸，確定適用的併網或項目技術要求。所有設備須針對極端高溫（環境溫度最高45°C）進行額定值設計並適當降額。
